comments.body:
Per https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/18596 and https://github.com/sirupsen/logrus/issues/1383 , this can break Podman; c/image and Skopeo doesn’t directly use that functionality, but that also means it benefits from nothing in this update.

So, holding off updating…
